{{Quote|Great. Out of all the planets in the galaxy, we have to pick one in the middle of a war.|[[Ferus Olin]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
'''Acherin''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[The Red Twins system/Legends|the Red Twins system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

==History==
{{Quote|We wanted the right to secede from the Republic, not to turn the galaxy into a place of absolute power. Now we've got an Emperor breathing down our necks. Anyway, we were negotiating a truce with the Republic army when the Clone Wars ended. After we got a look at the Empire, we decided to call off the truce and keep fighting instead.|[[Raina Quill]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of Acherin joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Garen Muln]] led the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] against the [[Droid Army]] of the Confederacy of Independent Systems, which had held the planet. Master Muln managed to work with the Separatists in negotiating a treaty near the end of the war, ending one of the [[Battle of Acherin (Clone Wars)|last battles]] of the conflict. However, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was soon thereafter initiated, resulting in Master Muln's retreat with the help of former Confederacy operatives. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was formed, the Separatists on Acherin decided to resist, fighting from their base of the ancient city of [[Eluthan]].

Several months following the rise of the Empire, Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], along with [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Trever Flume]], landed on Acherin, trying to escape from the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. They encountered the leaders of the resistance, [[Raina Quill]] and [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]], and helped them flee the planet when Imperial forces, under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Riwwel]], began an [[Battle of Acherin (Imperial Period)|orbital bombardment]] of Eluthan. Fleeing to an [[Jedi asteroid|asteroid]] in nearby space, Olin established a base for those fleeing the Empire. While a small colony formed on the asteroid, the Empire found the retreat and [[Twilight (operation)|destroyed]] it with a superlaser.
